simpleDefinition: The part of the human body that is on the opposite side to the chest and stomach.
exampleSentence: My back hurts.
exampleThai: หลังของฉันเจ็บ
imagePrompt: A person holding their lower back, indicating back pain.

thaiMeaning: ท้อง/กระเพาะอาหาร
simpleDefinition: The organ in your body where food goes and begins to be digested.
exampleSentence: I have a stomach ache.
exampleThai: ฉันปวดท้อง
imagePrompt: A person holding their stomach.

simpleDefinition: Any of the five individual parts at the end of the foot.
exampleSentence: She painted her toenails.
exampleThai: เธอทาสีเล็บเท้าของเธอ
imagePrompt: A close-up of a foot with painted toes.

simpleDefinition: One of the hard, white objects in the mouth that are used for biting and chewing.
exampleSentence: I need to brush my teeth.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องแปรงฟัน
imagePrompt: A clean, white tooth.

simpleDefinition: The part of the body that joins the head to the shoulders.
exampleSentence: He wore a scarf around his neck.
exampleThai: เขาพันผ้าพันคอรอบคอของเขา
imagePrompt: A person wearing a warm scarf around their neck.

simpleDefinition: One of the two parts of the body at each side of the neck that join the arms to the rest of the body.
exampleSentence: He carried the bag on his shoulder.
exampleThai: เขาสะพายกระเป๋าบนไหล่ของเขา
imagePrompt: A person carrying a heavy bag on one shoulder.

simpleDefinition: The middle joint of the leg that allows the leg to bend.
exampleSentence: She fell and hurt her knee.
exampleThai: เธอหกล้มและเจ็บเข่า
imagePrompt: A person with a bandage on their knee.

simpleDefinition: The red liquid that is sent around the body by the heart.
exampleSentence: He lost a lot of blood.
exampleThai: เขาเสียเลือดมาก
imagePrompt: A single drop of red blood.

simpleDefinition: A substance used for treating illness.
exampleSentence: You need to take your medicine.
exampleThai: คุณต้องกินยาของคุณ
imagePrompt: A bottle of medicine and some pills.

simpleDefinition: Physically or mentally ill.
exampleSentence: I cannot go to work because I am sick.
exampleThai: ฉันไปทำงานไม่ได้เพราะฉันป่วย
imagePrompt: A sick person resting in bed with a thermometer.

thaiMeaning: เจ็บ/ทำให้เจ็บ
simpleDefinition: To feel pain in a part of your body, or to injure someone.
exampleSentence: My leg hurts.
exampleThai: ขาของฉันเจ็บ
imagePrompt: A person with a sad face touching a hurt leg.

thaiMeaning: ความเจ็บปวด
simpleDefinition: The feelings that you have in your body when you have been hurt or when you are ill.
exampleSentence: I have a sharp pain in my chest.
exampleThai: ฉันเจ็บแปลบที่หน้าอก
imagePrompt: A person holding their chest with an expression of pain.

thaiMeaning: นิ้วหัวแม่มือ
simpleDefinition: The short, thick finger on the side of your hand.
exampleSentence: He gave a thumbs up.
exampleThai: เขายกนิ้วหัวแม่มือให้
imagePrompt: A hand showing a thumbs-up gesture.

simpleDefinition: One of the two soft, red edges of the mouth.
exampleSentence: She bit her bottom lip.
exampleThai: เธอกัดริมฝีปากล่างของเธอ
imagePrompt: Close-up of a smiling mouth with red lips.

simpleDefinition: The large, soft piece of flesh in the mouth that you can move.
exampleSentence: The soup burnt my tongue.
exampleThai: ซุปลวกชิ้นของฉัน
imagePrompt: A face sticking its tongue out.

simpleDefinition: The natural outer layer that covers a person, animal, or fruit.
exampleSentence: She has very soft skin.
exampleThai: เธอมีผิวที่นุ่มมาก
imagePrompt: A hand applying lotion to soft skin.

simpleDefinition: Any of the hard parts inside a human or animal that make up its frame.
exampleSentence: The dog is chewing a bone.
exampleThai: สุนัขกำลังเคี้ยวกระดูก
imagePrompt: A white dog bone.

simpleDefinition: The organ in your chest that sends the blood around your body.
exampleSentence: Her heart beats fast.
exampleThai: หัวใจของเธอเต้นเร็ว
imagePrompt: A red heart symbol.

simpleDefinition: Strong and well; not ill.
exampleSentence: Eating vegetables keeps you healthy.
exampleThai: การกินผักช่วยให้คุณมีสุขภาพดี
imagePrompt: A person running in a park, looking healthy.

simpleDefinition: A substance used with water for washing and cleaning.
exampleSentence: Wash your hands with soap.
exampleThai: ล้างมือของคุณด้วยสบู่
imagePrompt: A bar of soap with bubbles.

simpleDefinition: A strip of leather or material worn around the waist to support clothes.
exampleSentence: He wears a brown leather belt.
exampleThai: เขาใส่เข็มขัดหนังสีน้ำตาล
imagePrompt: A classic brown leather belt with a metal buckle.

simpleDefinition: A long, thin piece of material that is worn under a shirt collar.
exampleSentence: He wore a shirt and tie to the interview.
exampleThai: เขาใส่เสื้อเชิ้ตและเนกไทไปสัมภาษณ์
imagePrompt: A neat blue tie hanging on a rack.

simpleDefinition: A piece of clothing that is worn on the hand and wrist for warmth or protection.
exampleSentence: I need gloves because it is cold.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องใช้ถุงมือเพราะอากาศหนาว
imagePrompt: A pair of warm winter gloves.

simpleDefinition: A piece of cloth that you wear around your neck, head, or shoulders, especially to keep warm.
exampleSentence: She wrapped a scarf around her neck.
exampleThai: เธอพันผ้าพันคอรอบคอของเธอ
imagePrompt: A cozy knitted scarf.

thaiMeaning: เครื่องแบบ
simpleDefinition: A special set of clothes that are worn by people who do a particular job or go to a particular school.
exampleSentence: The students wear a school uniform.
exampleThai: นักเรียนสวมเครื่องแบบนักเรียน
imagePrompt: A neat school uniform with a tie.

thaiMeaning: ชุดว่ายน้ำ
simpleDefinition: A piece of clothing that you wear for swimming.
exampleSentence: She bought a new swimsuit for the beach.
exampleThai: เธอซื้อชุดว่ายน้ำใหม่สำหรับไปทะเล
imagePrompt: A colorful one-piece swimsuit.

simpleDefinition: A jacket and trousers or a jacket and skirt that are made from the same material.
exampleSentence: He wears a suit to the office.
exampleThai: เขาใส่ชุดสูทไปออฟฟิศ
imagePrompt: A professional dark suit on a hanger.

thaiMeaning: รองเท้าบูท
simpleDefinition: A type of shoe that covers the whole foot and the lower part of the leg.
exampleSentence: I wear boots when it snows.
exampleThai: ฉันใส่รองเท้าบูทเมื่อหิมะตก
imagePrompt: A pair of brown leather boots.

thaiMeaning: รองเท้าผ้าใบ
simpleDefinition: Shoes worn for sports or casual wear.
exampleSentence: He bought a new pair of sneakers.
exampleThai: เขาซื้อรองเท้าผ้าใบคู่ใหม่
imagePrompt: A pair of stylish white sneakers.

thaiMeaning: แว่นตากันแดด
simpleDefinition: Dark glasses that you wear to protect your eyes from the sun.
exampleSentence: She is wearing sunglasses at the beach.
exampleThai: เธอสวมแว่นตากันแดดที่ชายหาด
imagePrompt: A pair of black sunglasses.

thaiMeaning: กระเป๋าเสื้อ/กางเกง
simpleDefinition: A small piece of material attached to the inside or outside of a piece of clothing, used for keeping things in.
exampleSentence: He put his hands in his pockets.
exampleThai: เขาล้วงมือเข้าไปในกระเป๋ากางเกง
imagePrompt: A close-up of a jeans pocket.

simpleDefinition: A small, round object that you push through a hole to fasten clothing.
exampleSentence: One button is missing from my shirt.
exampleThai: กระดุมหลุดหายไปหนึ่งเม็ดจากเสื้อเชิ้ตของฉัน
imagePrompt: A close-up of a white shirt button.

simpleDefinition: A thing for fastening clothes or bags, consisting of two rows of metal or plastic teeth.
exampleSentence: I cannot open the zip on my bag.
exampleThai: ฉันเปิดซิปกระเป๋าไม่ได้
imagePrompt: A close-up of a metal zip.

simpleDefinition: To have clothing, jewellery, etc. on your body.
exampleSentence: She wears a dress to the party.
exampleThai: เธอสวมชุดเดรสไปงานปาร์ตี้
imagePrompt: A person getting dressed in a nice outfit.

thaiMeaning: ลูกพี่ลูกน้อง
simpleDefinition: A child of your aunt or uncle.
exampleSentence: My cousin is coming to visit.
exampleThai: ลูกพี่ลูกน้องของฉันกำลังจะมาเยี่ยม
imagePrompt: Two children playing together, representing cousins.

thaiMeaning: ปู่, ย่า, ตา, ยาย
simpleDefinition: The father or mother of your father or mother.
exampleSentence: We visit our grandparents every Sunday.
exampleThai: เราไปเยี่ยมปู่ย่าตายายทุกวันอาทิตย์
imagePrompt: An older couple smiling together.

simpleDefinition: The daughter of your son or daughter.
exampleSentence: She loves spending time with her granddaughter.
exampleThai: เธอชอบใช้เวลากับหลานสาวของเธอ
imagePrompt: A grandmother reading a book to a little girl.

simpleDefinition: The son of your son or daughter.
exampleSentence: His grandson likes to play football.
exampleThai: หลานชายของเขาชอบเล่นฟุตบอล
imagePrompt: A grandfather playing with a young boy.

thaiMeaning: แต่งงานแล้ว
simpleDefinition: Having a husband or wife.
exampleSentence: They have been married for five years.
exampleThai: พวกเขาแต่งงานกันมาห้าปีแล้ว
imagePrompt: A couple holding hands with wedding rings.

simpleDefinition: Not married, or not having a romantic relationship with someone.
exampleSentence: He is single and lives alone.
exampleThai: เขาเป็นโสดและอยู่คนเดียว
imagePrompt: A happy person standing alone.

simpleDefinition: Two children born at the same time to the same mother.
exampleSentence: The twins look exactly the same.
exampleThai: ฝาแฝดดูเหมือนกันเป๊ะ
imagePrompt: Two identical babies side by side.

simpleDefinition: A person or animal that has grown to full size and strength.
exampleSentence: This film is for adults only.
exampleThai: ภาพยนตร์เรื่องนี้สำหรับผู้ใหญ่เท่านั้น
imagePrompt: A grown person in a business suit.

simpleDefinition: A young person between 13 and 19 years old.
exampleSentence: My son is a teenager now.
exampleThai: ลูกชายของฉันเป็นวัยรุ่นแล้วตอนนี้
imagePrompt: A young person listening to music with headphones.

simpleDefinition: A young human being who is not yet an adult.
exampleSentence: The child is playing in the park.
exampleThai: เด็กกำลังเล่นอยู่ในสวนสาธารณะ
imagePrompt: A small child playing with a toy.

simpleDefinition: A mother or father of a person or an animal.
exampleSentence: You should listen to your parents.
exampleThai: คุณควรเชื่อฟังพ่อแม่ของคุณ
imagePrompt: A mother and father standing together.

simpleDefinition: The woman who is married to someone's father but who is not their real mother.
exampleSentence: His stepmother is very kind.
exampleThai: แม่เลี้ยงของเขาใจดีมาก
imagePrompt: A caring older woman with a child.

simpleDefinition: The man who is married to someone's mother but who is not their real father.
exampleSentence: Her stepfather taught her how to drive.
exampleThai: พ่อเลี้ยงของเธอสอนเธอขับรถ
imagePrompt: An older man helping a child with a task.

simpleDefinition: A member of your family.
exampleSentence: Many relatives came to the wedding.
exampleThai: ญาติหลายคนมางานแต่งงาน
imagePrompt: A large group of people gathered for a family photo.

thaiMeaning: แขก (ที่มาเยี่ยมบ้าน)
simpleDefinition: A person that you have invited to your house or to a particular event that you are paying for.
exampleSentence: We have guests coming for dinner.
exampleThai: เรามีแขกมาทานอาหารเย็น
imagePrompt: A person welcoming someone at their front door.

thaiMeaning: คู่รัก, คู่สามีภรรยา
simpleDefinition: Two people who are married or in a romantic relationship.
exampleSentence: The couple walked hand in hand.
exampleThai: คู่รักเดินจับมือกัน
imagePrompt: Two people walking closely together.
